title: *WARNING* Emails & Activities Automation Is Messing With Your Reports!
excerpt: If you are using the Emails & Activities automations to track your activities for yourself or you team, your emails are not being recorded as activities. For some reason emails are not handled under the “All Activities” …

posts.author: jessetolppa (Jesse Tolppa)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you are using the Emails & Activities automations to track your activities for yourself or you team, your emails are not being recorded as activities. For some reason emails are not handled under the “All Activities” selection and your activities reports are inaccurate. Because the E&A automation is an app and not a regular automation tool, there is no good workaround that doesn’t require creating a bunch of unnecessary clutter in your boards.

MONDAY, please address this ASAP. This is essential reporting data for anyone managing a team.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a huge help. I’ve had to use up automations to track outside of E&A
